query:
ALTER TABLE driver_profiles 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phone_verified BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS phone_auth_sessions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  phone_number VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  device_fingerprint VARCHAR(128),
  driver_profile_id INT,
  user_id INT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  last_seen_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW(),
  CONSTRAINT phone_auth_sessions_id PRIMARY KEY(id),
  CONSTRAINT phone_auth_sessions_phone_number_unique UNIQUE(phone_number)
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  phone_number VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  device_fingerprint VARCHAR(128),
  driver_profile_id INT,
  user_id INT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  last_seen_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW(),
  CONSTRAINT phone_auth_sessions_id PRIMARY KEY(id),
